About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Your trusted auto AC partner in Varna
About.story: HOT22 is a specialized auto air conditioning service in Varna. With years of experience and modern equipment, we offer a full range of services — from diagnostics and recharge to complete repair of your car's climate system.
About.mission: Our mission is to ensure comfort and safety for every driver, regardless of car make and model.

FAQ.q1: How often should I recharge my car's AC?
FAQ.a1: We recommend checking and recharging the climate system every 2 years or when you notice reduced cooling efficiency. If your AC is blowing warm air, it's time for a visit.
FAQ.q2: What's the difference between R134a and R1234yf refrigerant?
FAQ.a2: R134a is the standard refrigerant for cars manufactured before 2017. R1234yf is the new generation, more eco-friendly refrigerant, mandatory for newer models. At HOT22, we work with both types.
FAQ.q3: How long does an AC recharge take?
FAQ.a3: A standard recharge takes about 30-60 minutes, including diagnostics, vacuuming, and refrigerant charging. More complex issues may require additional time.
FAQ.a4: Ozone treatment is a cabin disinfection procedure using ozone gas. It eliminates bacteria, viruses, mold, and unpleasant odors. The procedure takes about 30 minutes and is recommended after winter or when purchasing a used car.
FAQ.q5: Do you service all car brands?
FAQ.a5: Yes, at HOT22 we service all makes and models — from mainstream to premium vehicles. We have modern equipment for diagnostics and repair of climate systems on any vehicle.
FAQ.q6: How can I book an appointment?
FAQ.a6: You can book online through our booking form, call us at 089 338 3443, or message us on WhatsApp. We'll confirm your appointment within the business day.

repair-recharge.hook: AC not cooling? We fix the problem in 30-60 minutes.
problems: Compressor cycles on and off frequently
Strange noises when AC turns on
steps: Vacuum to remove moisture and air
repair-recharge.equipment: We work with professional TEXA Konfort 780 Touch BI-GAS and TEXA 705R stations for precise R134a and R1234yf recharging.
repair-recharge.timing: We recommend a check every 2 years or immediately when you notice reduced cooling. Best time: before summer.

heating-repair.hook: Heater not working? We remove the dashboard and fix it thoroughly.
problems: Heater doesn't warm or warms weakly
Bad smell when heater turns on
heating-repair.equipment: We have a complete toolkit for dashboard removal on all European car makes.
heating-repair.timing: Check before winter season. If you notice fogging or weak heating — don't wait.

ozone-treatment.hook: Bad smell in your car? Ozone treatment eliminates it completely in 30 minutes.
problems: Bought a used car with unknown smells
ozone-treatment.equipment: We use a professional high-concentration ozone generator for complete elimination of bacteria, viruses, and odors.
ozone-treatment.timing: Recommended after winter, when buying a used car, or when unpleasant odors appear.

system-flush.hook: Contaminated AC system? We flush it for full efficiency restoration.
problems: Dirty or dark refrigerant found during check
System with metal particles from worn compressor
system-flush.equipment: We use specialized flushing stations for complete cleaning of condenser, evaporator, and hoses.
system-flush.timing: Necessary when replacing compressor, when metal particles are found, or with recurring issues.

leak-detection.hook: Refrigerant leaking fast? We find the exact leak location with professional equipment.
problems: AC stops cooling shortly after recharge
Visible oily spots on AC hoses
leak-detection.equipment: We have an electronic refrigerant detector and UV lamp for finding the smallest micro-leaks.
leak-detection.timing: If your AC loses refrigerant faster than normal (normal loss is ~10-15% per year).

compressor-repair.hook: The compressor is the heart of your AC. We repair or replace it quickly and professionally.
problems: Loud noise when AC turns on
compressor-repair.equipment: We work with original and quality aftermarket compressors for all makes. Full system flush included with replacement.
compressor-repair.timing: Urgent — when compressor is seized or AC has no cooling at all. Don't delay — damage can spread.

ServicesList.pageSubtitle: Full spectrum care for your car's climate system
ServicesList.repair-rechargeDesc: Full diagnostics, refrigerant recharge with R134a and R1234yf, leak repair and complete AC system overhaul.
ServicesList.heating-repairDesc: Dashboard removal, heater core cleaning and repair for optimal winter performance.
ServicesList.valve-repairDesc: Repair and replacement of valves for precise cabin temperature control.
ServicesList.ozone-treatmentDesc: Professional ozone cleaning — elimination of odors, bacteria and moisture from the car cabin.
ServicesList.system-flushDesc: Complete AC system flush to remove contaminants, old oil and metal particles.
ServicesList.leak-detectionDesc: Precision refrigerant leak detection with professional leak detector equipment.
ServicesList.uv-testDesc: Ultraviolet testing to detect the smallest leaks in the refrigerant system.
ServicesList.compressor-repairDesc: Diagnostics, repair or replacement of the compressor — the heart of the AC system.
ServicesList.condenser-replacementDesc: Replacement of damaged condenser to restore cooling efficiency.
ServicesList.evaporator-replacementDesc: Replacement of the evaporator — a key component for cooling air in the cabin.
ServicesList.cabin-filterDesc: Pollen filter replacement for clean and fresh air in the cabin.
ServicesList.refrigerant-r134a-r1234yfDesc: Recharge with both main refrigerant types for older and newer car models.
ServicesList.radiator-repairDesc: Diagnostics and repair of radiators for the AC and cooling systems.
ServicesList.seasonal-maintenanceDesc: Preparing the AC system for summer or winter — full inspection and maintenance.
ServicesList.electrical-repairDesc: Repair of fans, sensors, controls and electrical components of the AC system.
